betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Doped Samarium Oxide (Samarium Cobalt Magnet)§f

§aSamarium Cobalt Magnets are the high-field magnets used in QMD liquefier compressors!§f
The §bSamarium Cobalt Magnet§f (`qmd:part:13`, ore dict `magnetSamariumCobalt`) is a rare-earth permanent magnet needed to construct the §bSamarium Cobalt Liquefier Compressor§f, one of the high-tier cooling machines in QMD.

§6Production Path (QMDRecipes.java:509)§f:
The Samarium Cobalt Magnet is crafted in an §bNC Assembler§f:
- Input 1: §bCobalt Ingot§f (`qmd:ingot:4` / `hbm:ingot_cobalt`, 2 units)
- Input 2: §bSamarium Dust§f (`qmd:dust2:3`, 1 unit)
- Output: §bSamarium Cobalt Magnet§f (1 unit)
- Time/Power: 1 RF/t baseline

§6Source of Samarium Dust§f:
§b• Samarium Dust§f is obtained by processing raw §bSamarium Ore§f in the §bOre Leacher§f (recipe `oreBoron`/`oreSamarium` chemistry chain) or in an §bNC Mass Spectrometer§f. The graph shows 18 crafting recipes and 12 downstream uses for the magnet.

§6Primary Use§f:
Per `QMDCraftingRecipeHandler.java:256`, the Samarium Cobalt Magnet is consumed in this shaped crafting recipe:
- Output: §bSamarium Cobalt Liquefier Compressor§f (`qmd:liquefier_compressor:2`, block ID `samarium_cobalt`, 4 units)
- Pattern (3×3): §bI-S-I / M-C-M / I-S-I§f
  - I = §bSteel Ingot§f, S = §bSamarium Cobalt Magnet§f, M = §bMotor§f, C = §bSteel Frame§f

§eTip§f: Samarium ore is comparatively rare — establish a §bMass Spectrometer§f or §bOre Leacher§f pipeline before you commit to building multiple Liquefier Compressors. A single magnet requires 2 cobalt + 1 samarium dust, and a single Liquefier Compressor requires 4 magnets.
